description: Minimum fields a native D3D12 runtime capture must contain to upgrade FSR 4.1.0 static claims to runtime-observed. A capture missing any required_field is insufficient.

required_fields.dispatch_index: int — sequential dispatch number within a frame
required_fields.root_signature_hash: string — SHA-256 of serialized root signature
required_fields.descriptor_table_handles: array — GPU descriptor handles per root parameter
required_fields.cbv_values: object — GPU VA + hex dump per CBV root parameter
required_fields.srv_resource_ids: array — resource IDs resolved from descriptor heaps
required_fields.uav_resource_ids: array — resource IDs resolved from descriptor heaps
required_fields.dispatch_dimensions: array — [x, y, z] thread group counts

frame_metadata.dll_hashes: object — SHA-256 of each FSR DLL

optional_fields.quality_preset: string — quality | balanced | performance | ultraperf | native | drs
optional_fields.frame_index: int — frame number in the capture session
